disclaimer.metro: Schedules shown are the public timetable data published by Metro do Porto, free of charge. This app has no connection to real-time running and cannot account for delays, cancellations, or last-minute changes — always confirm with the operator before traveling.
disclaimer.cp: Schedules shown are the public timetable data published by CP (Comboios de Portugal), free of charge. This app has no connection to real-time running and cannot account for delays, cancellations, or last-minute changes — always confirm with the operator before traveling.
disclaimer.stcp: Schedules shown are the public timetable data published by STCP, free of charge. This app has no connection to real-time running and cannot account for delays, cancellations, or last-minute changes — always confirm with the operator before traveling.
disclaimer.connections: Connections to other public transport, when shown, are based only on proximity (stops within 400 m) — not on guaranteed transfers.
